query:
ALTER TABLE historical_claims 
ADD COLUMN replay_mode TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '0 = normal, 1 = replay enabled',
ADD COLUMN last_replayed_at TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT 'When this claim was last replayed',
ADD COLUMN replay_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Number of times replayed';

ADD COLUMN last_replayed_at TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT 'When this claim was last replayed',
ADD COLUMN replay_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Number of times replayed';
